concept_hook: A cybernetic virtuoso who uploads her consciousness into interchangeable bodies, treating her physical form as disposable hardware.
narrative_role: The dissociated philosopher who questions what makes her human; her rivalry with Tech Savant explores whether calculation or emotion wins
media_archetype_inspiration: Motoko Kusanagi from Ghost in the Shell meets Black Widow's precision

concept_hook: A faith-fueled exorcist who believes her body is a holy vessel, using sacred combat to drive out the demonic from AFL's supernatural fighters.
narrative_role: The believer whose certainty masks self-doubt; her rivalry with Phlogiston represents science vs. faith, while Iron Monarch sees her as a potential tool
media_archetype_inspiration: Exorcist nun meets tactical priest from Constantine

concept_hook: A seductive demon who feeds on male hubris, making opponents overestimate their chances before crushing them psychologically.
narrative_role: The predator who makes men destroy themselves; her rivalry with Silk Siren asks which seduction is more dangerous—genuine or supernatural
media_archetype_inspiration: Lara Croft's confidence meets classic succubus mythology with modern polish

concept_hook: A battle-hardened mercenary who uses traps, bait, and patience to exhaust and humiliate opponents before delivering the killing strike.
narrative_role: The patient predator who views every fight as a hunt; her rivalry with Venom Vixen questions whether poison or patience wins
media_archetype_inspiration: Black Widow meets wilderness survivalist from The Revenant

concept_hook: A genetic experiment who can shapeshift her body, making her form unpredictable and her attacks impossible to anticipate.
narrative_role: The unstable experiment desperate to prove her worth; her rivalry with Phlogiston explores whether self-destruction leads to transcendence
media_archetype_inspiration: X-23 meets shapeshifter from The Thing

concept_hook: A cold, calculating socialite who uses wealth and influence as weapons, crushing rivals through economic warfare before fights even begin.
narrative_role: The oligarch who buys victories; her rivalry with Iron Monarch explores which empress truly rules—the born or the made
media_archetype_inspiration: Miranda Priestly meets Bond villainess sophistication

concept_hook: A young prodigy from the favelas who uses capoeira-inspired movement and sonic technology to disorient opponents with rhythm and sound.
narrative_role: The rising star who dances through danger; her rivalry with Venom Vixen explores which Brazilian fighter owns the night
media_archetype_inspiration: Luisa from Encanto meets musical fighter from Scott Pilgrim

concept_hook: A plant-controlling dryad who uses botanical biotechnology to grow weapons and toxins from her own body, blurring the line between woman and weapon.
narrative_role: The eco-terrorist who believes nature will judge humanity; her rivalry with Flor Nocturna questions which predator owns the jungle
media_archetype_inspiration: Poison Ivy meets tribal nature goddess from Avatar
